query:
SELECT c.id, c.title, COUNT(m.id) as total_modules, COUNT(l.id) as total_lessons
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN modules m ON c.id = m.course_id
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
WHERE c.title IN ('Trilha Iniciante', 'Trilha Intermediária', 'Trilha Avançada')
GROUP BY c.id, c.title;

LEFT JOIN lessons l ON m.id = l.module_id
